name: Fudge Squares with Mocha Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Butter an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg to the mixture and whisk until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and baking powder.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk, until well incorporated.
6. Stir in the vanilla extract and chopped walnuts.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until the edges pull away from the sides of the pan. Allow the cake to cool completely.
9. For the glaze, melt the chocolate in a bowl. Add powdered sugar, butter, and almond extract; whisk until smooth. Stir in the coffee until combined.
10. Cover and refrigerate the glaze until ready to use.
11. Once the cake is cooled, pour the glaze over the top. Allow to set before cutting into squares.
